app.name: Radio Sankt
nowPlaying.source.localTooltip: Playing a file from this computer (your library)
nowPlaying.seekHelp: Click or drag; far right goes to the end (last ~0.1s - Spotify limit)
nowPlaying.seekNearEndTitle: Double-click: jump near end (for testing transitions)
layout.browserPreview.line1: Browser preview only - Spotify and file access need Electron. Run {{command}} (Vite + desktop; DevTools opens docked at the bottom).
layout.browserPreview.line2: In this tab only, use {{f12}} or macOS {{macShortcut}} for DevTools.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Radio Sankt
onboarding.welcome.body: Build and broadcast your own radio station using your Spotify library. Automate your playlist, add jingles, and go live - all from one place.
onboarding.language.title: Choose your language
onboarding.language.body: Pick your preferred language. You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.spotify.title: Connect your Spotify account
onboarding.spotify.browserWarning: This screen is open in a normal browser tab, so Spotify login cannot run here (there is no Electron bridge). Close this preview and start the desktop shell from the project folder: {{command}}
onboarding.spotify.explain: This app uses the Spotify API to search and play music. You'll need a free Spotify Developer account to get a Client ID - it takes about 2 minutes.
onboarding.spotify.step5: Save, then copy your Client ID from the app dashboard
onboarding.spotify.connectionFailedGener: Connection failed - double-check your Client ID and make sure the Redirect URI is set correctly.
onboarding.jingles.title: Add a jingle or vinheta
onboarding.jingles.body: Jingles are short audio clips that play between songs - station IDs, sound effects, news tones, or ads.
onboarding.ready.title: You're all set!
settings.title: Settings
settings.language.label: Language
settings.spotify.infoBox: You need a free Spotify Developer account to use this app. Click "How to connect" to learn more.
settings.spotify.warningText: The Spotify permission screen must match your developer app (the name you gave it on the dashboard). If Spotify asks you to approve Stream Deck or any app you did not create, clear the Client ID field, create your own app on the dashboard, and paste its Client ID - otherwise playlists will always fail with 403.
settings.spotify.clientIdTooltip: Your Spotify app's Client ID from developer.spotify.com/dashboard
settings.spotify.scopesHint: Spotify's "Agree" page often only mentions public playlists; the real list is in the browser tab after login and below. You need playlist-read-private for "Your playlists."
settings.spotify.scopesNotLoaded: Scopes aren't loaded yet - switch away and back to Settings, or reconnect.
settings.spotify.volumeRejected: This device refused remote volume control (often the Web Player or some speakers). Ducking, Live-mode fade, and the in-app volume slider will have no audible effect until you switch to the Spotify desktop or mobile app.
settings.spotify.webPlayback.idle: Log in to Spotify to start remote-controlling the Spotify app.
settings.spotify.webPlayback.initializin: Discovering available Spotify devices (Spotify desktop app, phone, speakers)...
settings.spotify.webPlayback.ready: Connected to a Spotify device. You can play tracks from search and automation.
settings.spotify.webPlayback.error: See details below. Most issues are fixed by opening the Spotify app on this computer (or any signed-in device), making sure you are signed in, and reconnecting.
settings.spotify.setup.step2: Log in with your Spotify account (free or premium).
settings.spotify.setup.step6: If the app is in Development mode, add your Spotify login under User management so the Web API accepts your account.
settings.spotify.setup.step7: Copy the Client ID of the app you just created (yours), not another product's ID. If you see another app name in consent, your Client ID is wrong.
settings.updates.invalidResponse: Update check returned nothing valid. Fully quit and reopen the app so main and UI stay in sync.
settings.updates.devOnly: Updates are only checked in the installed app, not in development.
settings.updates.upToDateWithVersion: You're up to date. Latest release on the update server is v{{version}}.
schedule.title: Program schedule
schedule.description: Weekly blocks repeat each week. Turn on "Follow schedule" so automation loads the set for the current block (including if you open the app mid-block). The app must stay open.
schedule.desktopOnly: Program schedule runs in the desktop app. Open Radio Sankt with Electron to plan weekly blocks.
schedule.clickHint: Click a 15-minute slot to add a block
workspace.playlists.noPlayableTracks: This playlist has no playable Spotify tracks (local files are skipped).
workspace.search.addedPlaylistBlock: Added playlist "{{name}}" as one program step
automation.playlist.noneYet: No saved sets yet. Use "Save set" to store one.
automation.playlist.updateHint: Load set restores the last saved version until you Update.
schedule.maxAirtimeInvalid: Max airtime must be a positive number of minutes or empty.
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.transition.label: Song transition
settings.transition.tooltip: Applies to song and playlist steps in the queue
settings.transition.fadeInTooltip: Default duration for fading audio in when a track starts
settings.transition.fadeOutTooltip: Default duration for fading audio out when a track ends
settings.transition.crossfadeTooltip: Duration of the overlap when crossfading between two tracks
settings.transition.duckTooltip: How much to reduce music volume when a jingle plays over it. Lower = quieter music.
workspace.search.goSettingsConnectSpotif: Go to Settings to connect your Spotify account
workspace.search.noJinglesYet: No jingles added yet. Add them from the Manage Jingles menu.
workspace.search.noAdsYet: No ads added yet. Add them from the Manage menu.
workspace.playlists.noneInBatch: No playlists you own in this batch. Load more to keep scanning your library.
workspace.playlists.noneOwned: No playlists you own. Playlists you only follow are hidden (Spotify Web API).
workspace.playlists.playWholeNow: Play the whole playlist now on the in-app player
workspace.cart.title: Soundboard
workspace.cart.subtitle: Quick-fire clips for live moments
workspace.jingles.addLocalFiles: Add local files to your {{kind}} library
workspace.jingles.jinglesHelp: Jingles can be used in automation and live soundboard slots.
workspace.jingles.adsHelp: Ads are used by automation break rules.
automation.queue.title: Automation Queue
automation.queue.continueRecommendations: When the program ends after a playlist, continue with Spotify recommendations from the last track
automation.queue.ruleSummary: Every {{songs}} songs, play {{clips}} clips, avoid repeating last {{avoid}}
automation.queue.pickOneClip: Pick at least one clip in the pools
automation.queue.breakHint: Breaks are inserted between tracks while automation is running. Add songs to the queue and press Play.
automation.queue.noClipsYet: No clips in the library yet - add jingles or ads from Search, then Manage.
automation.queue.stopReset: Stop automation and reset to the beginning
automation.empty.title: Your automation playlist is empty
automation.empty.body: Use Search to add tracks, jingles, or ads, or Load set to open a saved automation. The queue is restored after restart.
schedule.modal.estimatedLength: Estimated length: {{length}} - use max airtime to trim if the slot is shorter.
